title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server to pull and run large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, offering a simple interface to chat, generate, and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node or browsers via a lightweight wrapper.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that wraps Ollama models for use in chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama, styled like ChatGPT and supporting multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, providing builders and async wrappers for all Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with interactive model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style plugin for VS Code that uses Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends code or prompts to Ollama and streams responses directly into buffers.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs and Markdown files.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Go, Rust, C#, Swift and other languages.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds a /ollama slash command to generate or summarize blocks using local models.
